scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w web && npm run typecheck -w api
scripts.start:api:express: npx prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && node apps/api/dist/src/expressServer.js
scripts.start: npx prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && node apps/api/dist/src/expressServer.js
